title: Jarul’s Legend Is Challenged
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Franky as Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.
scene: Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: UUGG GGGGH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Still GGG GGGH!!! hh...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The new world isn't all that's in turmoil...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: My life is...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Due to deployment of the new anti-pirate weapon, all soldiers involved are being docked pay.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those officers failed to capture the straw hats.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And we got lumped with those incompetent fools and had our pay cut!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: During

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Mister!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey, mister!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and now my favourite cafe is being overrun by brats...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Can my life get any worse?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know I'm supposed to keep an open mind...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But still!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Why won't anyone recognize my ability?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will I ever get another chance to prove myself?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, old man! Old man! Can ya hear me?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There's some- thing big happening!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: SOME- THING BIG? ARE YOU PULLING MY LEG?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: FASTER!! THIS IS SUPER IMPORTANT!!

summary: This part advances the The Giants Turn on Their Legend through 20 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
